title: aspidium macleae
intro: Aspidium macleae, also known as the Aspidium macleae fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Aspidium macleae is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
